vulkan_dispatch_status: crash — VK_ERROR_DEVICE_LOST on vk::Queue::submit during llama_decode (same signature as the desktop RTX 2060 hang, tracked separately).

runs.name: test_adreno on-device
runs.note: Validates the adreno NEON path's math (VHT2 butterfly, band quant, Möbius, fp16 write path) on real S22 Ultra hardware. K corr = 0.9914 @ hd=64, fp16 = 0.9868.

runs.name: Dolphin-1B-Q8 perplexity (CPU backend, llama.cpp)
runs.note: On this legacy on-device binary SHANNON_PRIME_ENABLED=1 + SHANNON_PRIME_VERBOSE=1 prints no banner and yields an identical PPL — the llama.cpp-integrated hook isn't active in this build. To get a real SP-enabled on-device PPL delta the user needs to push a fresh android build from D:/F/shannon-prime-repos/shannon-prime-llama/android_build that links the current post-decode hook and the renamed symbols. The code is validated by test_adreno; the llama.cpp wiring on Android is a follow-up (same task category as the Vulkan GPU dispatch).
